WO-SPEC-DTO-DEMOGRAPHICS.title: Decouple Demographics from WorldState
WO-SPEC-DTO-DEMOGRAPHICS.instruction_raw: Refine MISSION_spec_dto_demographics.md. Focus on DemographicManager and AgentLifecycleManager. Propose interface-based registry injection.

WO-SPEC-DTO-VITAL-STATS.title: Decouple Vital Stats from WorldState
WO-SPEC-DTO-VITAL-STATS.instruction_raw: Refine MISSION_spec_dto_vital_stats.md. Focus on DemographicManager and BirthSystem. Propose registry injection.
